calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Continued To Apr-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Ryan appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

Mr. Ryan stated that he is asking for some guidance, that all he is trying to do is to get the title cleared, that he has a quiet title action pending to be heard in February in Amador County and asked how to do this. The Court informed Mr. Ryan that he has to get the quiet title action decided and then he can ask to close this estate for lack of assets. The Court also explained that it needs a proposed order to continue administration of this estate and directed Mr. Ryan to e-mail the proposed order to Ms. Hilton (Probate Examiner). The Status of Administration Report is continued to April 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Continued To Sep-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Ryan appeared telephone for Kristine Gunther (Petitioner).

Mr. Ryan apologized to the Court for failure to appear stating that he did not realize the hearing had been continued. The Court informed Mr. Ryan that it wants him to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Ryan stated that when they filed this probate, they were trying to clear a cloud in title, that he was not aware that they could not distribute to a deceased person and that rather than open another probate, they filed a quiet title action. Status on close of estate is continued to September 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Continued To Aug-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on August 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed, and to explain whether an estate matter has been opened for the post-deceased person. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Sep-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Jul-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Ryan appeared for Petitioner.

The Court stated that the petition seeks distribution to someone who is deceased, that it cannot do that, that there needs to be someone who is legally able to receive this, that it does not qualify for 13100 and that it does not see an alternative to getting an estate opened for the post-deceased person. The Court also stated that they will need to amend the petition, or withdraw it, or it can set a status date and continue it. Mr. Ryan elected to withdraw the petition. The Petition for Final Distribution is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for April 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
